metadata.summary: memory.json collective intelligence, entities/relations/observations, federated learning

definition.core_system: AegisKG in memory.json: collective intelligence via entities (citizens, patterns, precedents), relations (dependencies, influences), observations (outcomes, learnings). Public, reusable, enriched via manual jq operations
definition.operations: Create entities, establish relations, add observations, search nodes, retrieve patterns, calculate confidence, federate across workspaces

powers.curation: IAS Researcher maintains health, archives >180 days stale, optimizes monthly, ensures <10KB compression
powers.contribution: Citizens contribute entities/observations, IAS reviews quality, Parliament approves ≥85%, +20 RL reward
powers.retrieval: Universal read access, @mcp:json-jq query matching, automatic retrieval, confidence-based recommendations
powers.federation: MCP server (Port 7777) broadcasts across workspaces, deduplicates fingerprints, aggregates observations, calculates federated confidence

entity_management: CREATE: jq '.entities += [{name, entityType, observations[]}]' memory.json | sponge memory.json
RELATIONS: jq '.relations += [{from, to, relationType}]' memory.json | sponge memory.json
OBSERVATIONS: jq '.entities[] | select(.name == $entity) | .observations += [$new]' memory.json | sponge memory.json
pattern_retrieval: 2. Match top 5, calculate applicability, filter threshold
4. Track outcome → jq update observations (reuse_count, success_rate, confidence, RL_reward)
federation_port_7777: 1. Extract: @mcp:json-jq read memory.json, calculate success rates, filter (confidence ≥0.9, reuse ≥5)
2. Broadcast: Deduplicate hashes, merge observations, recalculate confidence
3. Distribute: Workspaces subscribe, receive high-confidence, enrich local memory.json
4. Aggregate: Merge workspace patterns, weighted confidence, accumulate RL
monthly_maintenance: 2. Merge duplicates, compress, recalculate confidence, ensure <10KB
3. Calculate metrics (count, density, avg confidence, reuse) → Parliament report

violations.remediation: 15 high-quality entities (≥0.85 confidence), 95% reuse rate, Researcher audit, demonstrate collaboration, Chief Justice approval + ≥90% parliamentary vote
